verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lonely days and lonely nights Filled with despair Caused me to long for someone who cares Then I heard Christ say to me This promise I'v made Lo I am with you now and forever Be not afraid.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Chorus I'll never be lonely again, Never again, For I have opened my heart door to him So I'll brush away my fears And forget my foolish ways I'll never be lonely again, Never again.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you're longing for a friend loving and true Turn to the Saviour He's waiting For you, He will do the same for you As He did for me He'll never leave you, never forsake you Trust Him and see.
